source_condition: EN-asset-is-English (en.json non-empty English; asset text field English). JP primary via ja.json; EN asset = structural authority.
build:
dotabyss-rpg-vn-translator/work/hmn_10240100003_full/build.py (field-index, split(',',5),
-count guard, comma->U+201A guard, BOM+CRLF preserved)

characters_and_voice.マニョリア (Magnolia / Manyo): Female forest princess; timid but earnest. To Commander: em–anh. Third-person self-reference 'Manyo' preserved. Speaker label kept JP verbatim.
characters_and_voice.<user> (Commander/司令官): Chỉ Huy; male; tôi/anh toward Magnolia (anh–em), confident planner voice.
characters_and_voice.怪しげな男 (suspicious man/thief): Crude greedy thief; rough register (tao/mày/ngươi). Speaker label kept JP.
characters_and_voice.マックン (Makkun/Mak): Magic plant spirit friend; boisterous casual (tớ/cậu), calls Magnolia 'Manyo', calls Commander 'anh'. Speaker label kept JP.
characters_and_voice.魔法植物 records: Onomatopoeia/SFX localized to Vietnamese (Ken két, Nhoẹt, Xoẹt, Ngoạm, Ùng ục) to avoid kept-English.

decisions: Commander/司令官 -> Chỉ Huy (source uses <user>/relationship; addressed as anh).
おにいさん from Magnolia -> anh / anh ơi (romantic-leaning affection, matches ending reveal).
Speaker name labels (field 1: マニョリア/怪しげな男/マックン/大口の魔法植物 etc.) kept JP byte-identical.
Proper names Makkun, Magnolia, Manyo, Eldorana, Hell Rafflesia romanized in dialogue.
SFX/interjection message records localized (not kept English) to satisfy unchanged-text check.
Title Case Vietnamese title: 'Công Chúa Của Khu Rừng'.

All ASCII commas inside VI text replaced with U+201A;
counts matched EN asset exactly.
